## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, certificates, or local user data committed
- [ ] No Electron security settings weakened
- [ ] No generated `release/`, `dist/`, or `node_modules/` files committed

## Release impact

- [ ] Version/changelog updated if needed
- [ ] Installer/update behavior checked if packaging changed
